page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c8g1.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 32 dedicated physical cores using Intel Xeon 8163 processors running at 2.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. For acceleration, the instance bundles four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs, delivering a total of 64 GB of VRAM. It does not include local NVMe storage, meaning all storage must be network-attached, and it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core CPU performance is relatively weak, as shown by stress-ng single-core and single-threaded gzip compression tests, which fall into the bottom 25% and 10% respectively. However, the 32 dedicated physical cores deliver average multi-core performance, with stress-ng multi-core, PassMark CPU, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression scores all placing in the middle 50%. Memory bandwidth is stable, with cached read-only small block speeds reaching 1313.7 GB/sec and uncached large block write speeds at 57.05 GB/sec.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, this instance represents a high-density GPU resource allocation. While the CPU single-thread performance is modest, the presence of four dedicated enterprise-grade GPUs makes it a viable option for parallel computing tasks where GPU acceleration outweighs raw CPU clock speed. The lack of local storage requires architectural planning for external storage solutions. This instance is suited for workloads such as deep learning training, parallel scientific simulations, GPU-accelerated database operations, and high-throughput rendering tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c8g1.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and KVM hypervisor, it is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM and four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs providing 64 GB of total VRAM. The instance does not include local storage and relies on a 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data shows weak single-core CPU performance but average multi-core and memory bandwidth capabilities, with PassMark CPU and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression scores landing in the middle 50%. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for parallel computing tasks that leverage multi-GPU setups rather than single-threaded CPU speed. It is suited for deep learning, parallel simulations, and GPU-accelerated data processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c8g1.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 32 Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs with 64 GB VRAM for parallel computing workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c8g1.8xlarge features 32 Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA V100 GPUs for GPU-accelerated workloads.
tagline: A multi-GPU accelerated platform featuring four dedicated graphics processors and thirty-two physical cores for parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: Four NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs with 64 GB total VRAM
32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores at 2.5 GHz
128.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Average multi-core and memory bandwidth benchmark performance
Suited for deep learning, parallel simulations, and GPU databases
